name: Color Picker — Canvas, Mixer, Named, Image, Saved

features.label: Visual Color Canvas
features.desc: 2D saturation/lightness picker canvas + hue bar slider. Drag to pick color visually — like Figma/Photoshop. Now the default tab.

features.label: Color Mixer
features.desc: Pick two colors + ratio slider → mixed color preview. Also shows 7-step gradient between the two colors.

features.label: CSS Named Colors
features.desc: 140+ CSS named colors (tomato, steelblue, coral…) in a searchable grid.

features.label: Color from Image
features.desc: Upload or drag-drop any image → extracts top 8 dominant colors using pixel quantization.

features.label: Saved Palettes
features.desc: Save named palettes from your color history. Persists in localStorage.
